scripts.build: ng build --configuration production && npm run flatten-dist
scripts.flatten-dist: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const src = 'dist/movie-discovery-app/browser'; const dest = 'dist/movie-discovery-app'; if(fs.existsSync(src)) { fs.readdirSync(src).forEach(file => { const srcPath = path.join(src, file); const destPath = path.join(dest, file); if(fs.lstatSync(srcPath).isDirectory()) { fs.cpSync(srcPath, destPath, {recursive: true}); } else { fs.copyFileSync(srcPath, destPath); } }); fs.rmSync(src, {recursive: true}); }"
